prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第27名，近年排名从第23名（2021–2023）略降至第27名（2025–2026），整体仍属全国顶尖梯队。
4. 【声誉热度】2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学被查事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；2024–2025年亦有投档线异常信号，但关注度较低；抖音热度排名第85（ 一般），短视频曝光量不高；冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、交通运输工程A -、土木工程A-、基础医学A-等13个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等中 南大学优势工科专业持续高热推荐，吸引高分考生；2026年福建省物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年19.2万人增加约1.2万人（+6%），竞争明显加剧；中南大学位于湖南长沙，属中部地区，对福建考生无显著地域偏好；该校在福建招生规模较大（物理类200+人），属跨省招生大户。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年大幅后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+2.6%）与福建省物理类考生显著增加（+6%）的供需矛盾，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有 加剧；预测最低位次约7071名，区间6571–7571名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6038 → 5229 → 5005 → 5579 → 6942, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then a significant decline; in 2025, it shifted back by about 1363 places compared to 2024, the largest fluctuation in five years, with a baseline ranking of about 6942; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 242 → 232 → 233 → 233 → 229, with a slight reduction in 2025; the 2026 plan is 235, an increase of 6 (+2.6%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with recent rankings slightly declining from 23rd (2021–2023) to 27th (2025–2026), still among the top tier nationally.
4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the investigation of former President Zhang Yaoxue, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology; there were also abnormal admission score signals in 2024–2025, but with low attention; Douyin heat ranking is 85th (average), with low short video exposure; 13 A- and above disciplines including Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Basic Medicine A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other advantageous engineering majors at Central South University continue to be highly recommended, attracting high-scoring students; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 12,000 (+6%) compared to 192,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the central region, with no significant regional preference for Fujian candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Fujian (200+ in Physics Category), making it a major cross-provincial enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in historical rankings in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.6%), the supply-demand contradiction of a significant increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates (+6%), and the slight inhibitory effect of a negative reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7071, with a range of 6571–7571.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6571–7571, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6571), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Stomatology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7571), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Materials/Chemical/Civil Engineering as safety options, while also considering relatively lower-ranking Tier 2 majors like Transportation and Surveying and Mapping.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to the former president being investigated), which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with overall attention not high; Marxist Theory is rated A-, which has some relevance to History Category majors (such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.); Nursing is rated A+, Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, etc., also reflecting the university's comprehensive strength.
